title: Breath VFX
description: Realistic breath vapor particles for your character. Constant effect enhanced during rain/snow. Pure visual immersion.
body:
❄️ Breath VFX

Add realistic breath vapor effects to your Minecraft character!
Features

- 🌬️ Constant breath particles - see your breath at all times
- 🌨️ Weather integration - enhanced visibility in rain/snow
- ⚡ Optimized performance - lightweight particle system
- 🎨 Pure cosmetic - no items, no mechanics, just atmosphere
- ⚙️ Fully configurable - customize to your preference

How It Works

Your character exhales visible breath vapor continuously:
- Breath particles spawn naturally
- More visible during rainy weather
- Enhanced during snowfall
- Works in any biome and dimension

Configuration

Simple config file lets you control:
- Weather-based enhancement
- Particle density
- Spawn rate
- Visual intensity

Client-Side

This is a client-side mod - works on any server without installation!

Perfect for immersive survival, atmospheric modpacks, and players who love environmental details.

---

Add life to your character!
